input.existing_structure: glued finger linkages on a monolithic shell
input.problem: a damaged finger linkage forces a full glove teardown

reasoning.rule: split each finger into a single-pin removable cartridge
reasoning.serviceability_check: finger cartridge swaps with one pin

output.proposal: make each finger a single-pin exo linkage cartridge

input.existing_structure: bonded actuator pods buried under the shell
input.problem: brake units cannot be serviced without cutting the shell

reasoning.rule: actuators mount on the dorsal plate with plug-in connectors

output.proposal: dorsal actuator module with plug-in connector

input.existing_structure: separate boards, battery and radio with long harness
input.problem: many harness runs raise failure points

reasoning.rule: merge electronics into one dorsal module under a tool-less lid

output.proposal: single dorsal control module with tool-less lid
output.verification: open lid and reach every connector by hand

input.existing_structure: loose cable and tendon covers
input.problem: separate covers add parts and snag

reasoning.rule: share the wrist band raceway for cable and tendon

output.proposal: wrist band raceway shared by cable and tendon
output.verification: open raceway and trace each line

input.existing_structure: over-merged hand exoskeleton in one rigid piece
input.problem: finger replacement now needs the whole exo removed

reasoning.rule: over-integration defeats serviceability metric

output.proposal: reject the one-piece exo; revert to per-finger cartridges

input.existing_structure: thin TPU band with no reinforcement
input.problem: band stretches and loses raceway alignment

reasoning.rule: print band as open ring with fillet edges and calibrate TPU flow

output.proposal: open-ring TPU band with comfort fillets
output.verification: measure raceway drift after flex cycles

input.existing_structure: hinge pins press-fit with zero clearance
input.problem: pin friction adds noise to flexion feedback

reasoning.rule: hold 0.2mm hinge pin clearance and deburr holes

input.existing_structure: no datum on dorsal plate
input.problem: modules misalign on reassembly

reasoning.rule: keep a visible dorsal datum edge for module alignment

output.proposal: dorsal datum edge for module seating

input.existing_structure: all five brakes on one shared shaft
input.problem: one brake fault disables all fingers

reasoning.rule: give each finger its own brake module and cable path

output.verification: fault-inject one finger, others keep working

input.existing_structure: captive screws everywhere on the lid
input.problem: too many fasteners slow service

reasoning.rule: use four corner screws plus a snap edge on the lid

input.existing_structure: no fingertip interface
input.problem: force has nowhere to anchor at the tip

reasoning.rule: add a slip-fit fingertip thimble per finger

input.existing_structure: hidden internal cable runs
input.problem: buried cables cannot be inspected

reasoning.rule: expose cable runs in the open raceway with strain relief

output.proposal: open raceway with strain relief clips
output.verification: trace cables end to end visually

input.existing_structure: actuator and linkage fused for stiffness
input.problem: fused unit blocks linkage-only replacement

reasoning.rule: decouple the fragile linkage from the actuator module

input.existing_structure: emblem printed as separate glued cap
input.problem: extra glued part adds steps

reasoning.rule: engrave the dorsal hex emblem into the lid

input.existing_structure: band buckle hidden under wiring
input.problem: buckle hard to reach for donning

reasoning.rule: do not bury the buckle; keep quick release exposed

input.existing_structure: single oversized brake for all force
input.problem: one heavy brake is hard to service and tune

reasoning.rule: use modular per-finger brakes sharing one manifold

output.verification: swap one brake, retune that finger only

input.existing_structure: linkage routed inside the finger sleeve
input.problem: internal routing hides wear and blocks service

reasoning.rule: route the linkage on the finger back, not inside the sleeve

input.existing_structure: no print orientation note for drums
input.problem: brake drums print with supports and rough bores

reasoning.rule: print brake drums upright so bores stay clean

input.existing_structure: service labels omitted
input.problem: users cannot tell which module is which

reasoning.rule: engrave per-module service labels near each access point

input.existing_structure: fasteners merged into the soft band
input.problem: screws in TPU strip out and block service

reasoning.rule: move fasteners to the rigid dorsal plate, snap-fit the band
